title: Velvety Tangy Jamaican Baby Koi Soup
description: A quick, eggfree Jamaican soup that blends the delicate flavor of baby koi with a bright, tangy citrus twist and creamy coconut base.

ingredients.name: scotch bonnet pepper
ingredients.notes: sliced, remove seeds for less heat

instructions: Heat a medium pot over medium heat and add the water, coconut milk, and crushed allspice berries; bring to a gentle simmer.
Add the sliced scotch bonnet pepper and minced ginger, letting the aromatics infuse for 1–2 minutes.
Gently place the baby koi fillets into the pot, ensuring they are submerged; cover and simmer for 5–7 minutes until the fish flakes easily.
Stir in the sliced scallions and lime juice, seasoning with salt to taste; remove from heat and let stand for 2 minutes to meld flavors.
Serve hot, optionally garnished with a sprinkle of fresh scallion or a dash of hot sauce if desired.
